mapper.select: SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, u.nickname AS senderNickname, cm.message_text AS messageText, cm.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_messages cm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.message_status = 'ACTIVE' AND cm.message_text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cm.message_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
